content.text: Add a config flag to archffp so blast-radius-only E2E mode can be opted into.
Will design the config knob and wire it through bootstrap.

Implementation done in PR #55, but it's stacked on PR #54 (which adds the underlying coverage hooks). PR #54 must merge into main before #55 can land cleanly. Should I:
  (a) wait for #54 to merge first, then rebase #55 onto main, OR
  (b) merge #55 into the stacked base now, accepting that we won't have main-clean history until #54 lands?

I need your call before I proceed.
